summary: End-to-end testing of the new Mobile Number Compatibility full-stack feature (admin + public). 11/11 backend pytest cases pass; all 10 frontend Playwright assertions pass. No critical bugs found.

issues: React console warning: Invalid DOM property 'fetchpriority' — should be camelCase 'fetchPriority'. Cosmetic only, doesn't break functionality. Located in /app/frontend/src/App.js around line 420.

tests_executed: Backend POST /api/admin/login wrong password -> 401 PASS
Backend POST /api/admin/login mobile=9999999999 (not allowed) -> 401 PASS
Backend POST /api/admin/login 9929059153/2193 -> 200 with token PASS
Backend GET /api/admin/users without token -> 401 PASS
Backend GET /api/admin/users with junk token -> 401 PASS
Backend GET /api/admin/users with valid token -> 200 list PASS

Backend POST /api/admin/users -> 200 creates active user; duplicate active mobile -> 400; soft-delete -> 200; appears in /history; disappears from /users; /api/check-authorized goes True->False with reason='not_authorized' PASS
Backend DELETE /api/admin/users/{unknown_id} -> 404 PASS
Backend GET /api/check-authorized/9876543210 -> authorized=true with name+expires_on PASS
Backend GET /api/check-authorized/1111111111 -> authorized=false reason=not_authorized PASS
Backend GET /api/check-authorized/123 -> authorized=false reason=invalid PASS
Frontend /mobile-compatibility shows mc-restricted-notice with 'Newalkkar Saandiip' + '+91 99290 59153' PASS
Frontend has NO 'Request Access' WhatsApp button anywhere on the page PASS
Frontend submitting unauthorized 1111111111 -> mc-auth-error card with mc-admin-phone='+91 99290 59153' PASS
Frontend submitting authorized 9876543210 -> mc-total-card + mc-modified + mc-pair-table render with mc-row-0..mc-row-8 (9 rows) PASS
Frontend nav-mobile-compatibility-link visible in desktop nav, href=/mobile-compatibility PASS
Frontend /admin login 9929059153/2193 -> dashboard (admin-logout-btn visible) PASS
Frontend /admin add user 8888888899 -> appears as row-8888888899 in Active table PASS
Frontend /admin remove -> appears under tab-history PASS
Frontend /admin admin-logout-btn -> back to admin-login-form PASS
action_items: (Cosmetic) Replace `fetchpriority` attribute with `fetchPriority` (camelCase) on the hero in /app/frontend/src/App.js to silence the React DOM-property warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `seed_admin()` is NOT idempotent w.r.t. password rotation — it only inserts a hash if the doc is missing. If the default password is ever changed via env, existing deployments will keep the old hash. Consider always upserting based on a configured DEFAULT_PASSWORD env var.
server.py: ADMIN_MOBILES and DEFAULT_PASSWORD are hard-coded constants. For production, these should come from env vars (DEFAULT_PASSWORD especially — currently '2193' is in source).
server.py: No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/admin/login — the playbook expects 5-fail lockout. Currently any number of password attempts are allowed.

server.py: JWT is returned in JSON and stored in localStorage on the frontend (key 'ns_admin_token'); the playbook prefers httpOnly cookie auth. XSS would expose the admin token. Consider migrating to httpOnly Secure cookie.

server.py: `expires_on` is stored as a free-form string and parsed with fromisoformat in /api/check-authorized; if a non-ISO value is ever inserted, the silent `except: pass` swallows the error and treats the user as still authorized. Validate `expires_on` strictly on POST (use date type in Pydantic).
server.py uses deprecated `@app.on_event('startup')` — FastAPI now recommends lifespan handlers.
AdminPage.jsx and App.js are large; could be split, but acceptable for current scope.
seed_data_creation: Test created+removed mobile 7011220033 (backend test) and 8888888899 (frontend test); both ended in 'removed' status (history). No active leftover beyond the original 9876543210 seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_mobile_compat.py (pytest, 11 cases). All Mobile Compatibility flows confirmed end-to-end: nav link, restricted notice, unauthorized->mc-auth-error with admin contact (no WhatsApp Request-Access button), authorized 9876543210 -> 9 pair rows. Admin /admin: login, add, remove (soft-delete), tab-history, logout all work. Frontend testids: admin-login-{mobile,password,submit}, admin-{add,logout,refresh}-btn, admin-form-{mobile,name,expiry,submit}, row-{mobile}, row-remove-{mobile}, tab-active, tab-history, mc-{restricted-notice,form,name,dob,mobile,submit,error,auth-error,admin-phone,total-card,modified,pair-table,row-0..8}.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues. Only a cosmetic React DOM-prop warning (fetchpriority -> fetchPriority) and a few hardening recommendations (rate-limit, env-driven password, httpOnly cookie auth, strict expires_on validation).
